title: Mechanically
description:
the first season of mechanical smp modpack.
The server no longer exists.
body:
This Modpack is the **public Version** Of the Mechanical Smp, mostly all the mods are included,
with a few being things like, Sodium, Animations and a few general inprovements

- This modpack is mainly based On mechanical things so if you dont like the create mod, i dont know why are you here
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

hope you enjoy!
